pooling: attention-mask mean pooling; no L2 normalization
attacker_side_information: Strengthened observer knows the exact full PCA basis V and document mean mu; only target cell key H is unknown in unknown-key/OLS/Procrustes.
normalization_scope: Native GTR vectors are intentionally unnormalized because the official corrector is checkpoint-compatible only with that representation; this is not the paper's literal unit-normalized e5 retrieval configuration.
pii_scope: Headline exact PII-ID recall excludes repeated names and includes visible email/phone/card identifiers. Names use a finite dictionary; cards have no visible denominator after 32-token truncation in this corpus.
bootstrap_scope: Descriptive conditional 95% hierarchical bootstrap; only two independent geometry designs, with key seed sampled within geometry/cohort.
